records.question: Who are the players that died in Kalamazoo, MI?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN player_college ON player.player_id = player_college.player_id
JOIN college ON player_college.college_id = college.college_id
WHERE player.death_city = 'Kalamazoo' AND player.death_state = 'MI'
records.pred_sql: SELECT player.player_id FROM player WHERE death_city = 'Kalamazoo' AND death_state = 'MI'

records.question: Which players named Tom, who throw right-handed, were born in Erie, PA with a birth day at least 19, debuted since 1982-07-15, are at least 71 inches tall, and played their final game on or after 1990-07-04?

records.question: Which players have a height of at least 73 and also have recorded all_star appearances, recorded appearances, received manager_awards, and received player_awards?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN all_star ON player.player_id = all_star.player_id
JOIN appearances ON player.player_id = appearances.player_id
JOIN manager_award ON player.player_id = manager_award.player_id
JOIN player_award ON player.player_id = player_award.player_id
WHERE player.height >= 73

SELECT player.player_id
FROM player
JOIN all_star ON player.player_id = all_star.player_id

JOIN manager_award ON player.player_id = manager_award.player_id
JOIN player_award ON player.player_id = player_award.player_id
WHERE player.height >= 73

records.question: Which players were born on the 6th and died on the 2nd, have at most 0 at-bats but at least 0 caught stealing in postseason, and played for teams at Exposition Park with no more than 222 stolen bases and attendance no more than 243826?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN batting_postseason ON player.player_id = batting_postseason.player_id
JOIN team ON batting_postseason.team_id = team.team_id
WHERE player.birth_day = 6 AND player.death_day = 2 AND batting_postseason.ab <= 0 AND team.park = 'Exposition Park' AND team.sb <= 222 AND team.attendance <= 243826 AND batting_postseason.cs >= 0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT player.player_id
FROM player
JOIN batting_postseason ON player.player_id = batting_postseason.player_id
JOIN home_game ON batting_postseason.team_id = home_game.team_id
WHERE player.birth_day = 6 
  AND player.death_day = 2 
  AND batting_postseason.ab <= 0 
  AND batting_postseason.cs >= 0 
  AND home_game.park_id = (SELECT park_id FROM park WHERE park_name = 'Exposition Park')
  AND home_game.attendance <= 243826 
  AND (SELECT SUM(sb) FROM team WHERE team.park = home_game.park_id) <= 222

JOIN manager_award ON player.player_id = manager_award.player_id
WHERE all_star.gp = 1 AND player.throws = 'R' AND all_star.game_num >= 0 AND manager_award.year = 1989

FROM player
JOIN all_star ON player.player_id = all_star.player_id
JOIN manager_award ON player.player_id = manager_award.player_id
WHERE player.throws = 'R' 
AND all_star.gp >= 0 
AND all_star.gp = 1 
AND manager_award.year = 1989

records.question: Which players named Goldsmith born in MD, weighing exactly 146, who died in Washington, have at most 19 batting games, exactly 2 catching games, and at least 0 pitching games?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN appearances ON player.player_id = appearances.player_id
WHERE player.death_city = 'Washington' AND player.name_last = 'Goldsmith' AND player.weight = 146 AND appearances.g_batting <= 19 AND player.birth_state = 'MD' AND appearances.g_c = 2 AND appearances.g_p >= 0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT player.player_id
FROM player
LEFT JOIN batting ON player.player_id = batting.player_id
LEFT JOIN pitching ON player.player_id = pitching.player_id
WHERE player.name_last = 'Goldsmith'
  AND player.birth_state = 'MD'
  AND player.weight = 146
  AND player.death_city = 'Washington'
  AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM batting WHERE player.player_id = batting.player_id) <= 19
  AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fielding WHERE player.player_id = fielding.player_id AND pos = 'C') = 2
  AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pitching WHERE player.player_id = pitching.player_id) >= 0

records.question: Who are the players with the last name Sabathia born in California that have been selected as all-stars?

records.question: Which players named Terry Francona, who debuted on or before 1981-08-19 and played their final game exactly on 1990-04-19, have received a manager award?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN manager_award ON player.player_id = manager_award.player_id
WHERE player.final_game = '1990-04-19' AND player.name_first = 'Terry' AND player.name_last = 'Francona' AND player.debut <= '1981-08-19'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT player.player_id
FROM player
JOIN manager_award ON player.player_id = manager_award.player_id
WHERE player.name_first = 'Terry' 
AND player.name_last = 'Francona' 
AND player.debut <= '1981-08-19' 
AND player.final_game = '1990-04-19'

records.question: Which players named Leo Ernest, weighing at most 160 and born in 1905 or earlier, made their debut on or before 1925-10-02 and have received a manager award?

records.question: Which players exactly 72 inches tall have been selected as all-stars in 2014 or later and also have college and appearance records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN all_star ON player.player_id = all_star.player_id
JOIN appearances ON player.player_id = appearances.player_id
JOIN player_college ON player.player_id = player_college.player_id
WHERE all_star.year >= 2014 AND player.height = 72

records.question: Which players with the last name 'Baker' have recorded all-star appearances, game appearances, manager awards, and player award votes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN all_star ON player.player_id = all_star.player_id
JOIN appearances ON player.player_id = appearances.player_id
JOIN manager_award ON player.player_id = manager_award.player_id
JOIN player_award_vote ON player.player_id = player_award_vote.player_id
WHERE player.name_last = 'Baker'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_id
FROM player p
JOIN all_star a ON p.player_id = a.player_id
JOIN appearances ap ON p.player_id = ap.player_id
JOIN manager_award ma ON p.player_id = ma.player_id
JOIN player_award_vote pav ON p.player_id = pav.player_id
WHERE p.name_last = 'Baker'

records.question: Which players named Gerald Arthur, born in Sacramento, CA, USA in August, who bat left-handed, weigh at most 185 pounds, and played their final game on or after July 8, 1993?

records.question: Which players that have recorded all_star, appearances, and fielding_outfield entries have a final game date exactly equal to '1972-10-03', appearances with games played in left field at least 0, a death month at least 12, appearances with games played in right field at least 94, a birth month at most 8, and fielding_outfield records with year at most 1955?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT player.player_id FROM player
JOIN all_star ON player.player_id = all_star.player_id
JOIN appearances ON player.player_id = appearances.player_id
JOIN fielding_outfield ON player.player_id = fielding_outfield.player_id
WHERE player.final_game = '1972-10-03' AND appearances.g_lf >= 0 AND player.death_month >= 12 AND appearances.g_rf >= 94 AND player.birth_month <= 8 AND fielding_outfield.year <= 1955
records.pred_sql:
SELECT player.player_id
FROM player
JOIN all_star ON player.player_id = all_star.player_id
JOIN appearances ON player.player_id = appearances.player_id
JOIN fielding_outfield ON player.player_id = fielding_outfield.player_id
WHERE player.final_game = '1972-10-03'
  AND appearances.g_all > 0
  AND appearances.g_lf >= 0
  AND appearances.g_rf >= 94
  AND player.birth_month <= 8
  AND fielding_outfield.year <= 1955
  AND player.death_month >= 12
